package.name: nav2_diffusion_global_planner
package.description: Nav2 GlobalPlanner plugin (Mode B) for generative global planning: a model proposes K candidate start-to-goal paths, a deterministic validity layer checks each against the global costmap, and the shortest collision-free path is returned (otherwise NoValidPathCouldBeFound). The proposal stage is a nav2_diffusion_core::PathModel seam (built-in analytic FanPathModel by default, learned models loadable via pluginlib). See docs/architecture.md section 3.2 (Mode B) and docs/safety.md.
